name: Daiko Tsusan Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daiko Tsusan Co.,Ltd. engages in CATV and information/telecommunications trading and consulting activities. The company is involved in trading of items required for the construction of networks, equipment maintenance, and system sophistication; and provision of consulting services for the design of system arrangement and selection of equipment/materials. Daiko Tsusan Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Matsuyama, Japan.
